payload.answer: Compiled the article content into small, traceable atomic memory-card candidates. No current user-specific durable memory was committed.
citations: AI memory systems need durable source evidence.
Atomic memory cards should be small and traceable.
A semantic index can improve recall, but the application database must own lifecycle and conflict state.

entity_resolution.reason: Input contains general design principles rather than a specific durable personal entity requiring resolution.
